ticket_recommendations.title: Godot headless validation fails
ticket_recommendations.description: Remediate EXEC-GODOT-004 by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
ticket_recommendations.suggested_fix_approach: Run a deterministic `godot --headless --path . --quit` validation during audit and keep the repo blocked until it succeeds or returns an explicit environment blocker instead.
ticket_recommendations.summary: Run a deterministic `godot --headless --path . --quit` validation during audit and keep the repo blocked until it succeeds or returns an explicit environment blocker instead.

ticket_recommendations.title: Android-targeted Godot repo still lacks export surfaces or debug APK proof while the repo claims release progress or completion
ticket_recommendations.description: Remediate EXEC-GODOT-005 by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
ticket_recommendations.suggested_fix_approach: Keep Godot Android repos blocked on explicit export surfaces plus debug APK proof. Once release work starts or the repo claims completion, require `export_presets.cfg`, non-placeholder `android/` support surfaces, and a debug APK at the canonical build path.
ticket_recommendations.summary: Keep Godot Android repos blocked on explicit export surfaces plus debug APK proof. Once release work starts or the repo claims completion, require `export_presets.cfg`, non-placeholder `android/` support surfaces, and a debug APK at the canonical build path.

ticket_recommendations.title: Source imports reference missing local modules
ticket_recommendations.description: Remediate REF-003 by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
ticket_recommendations.suggested_fix_approach: Audit local relative import paths and fail when the referenced module file is missing.
ticket_recommendations.summary: Audit local relative import paths and fail when the referenced module file is missing.
